case_title: CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV vs. DEITCH, MARCUS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV AS TO DEFENDANT DEITCH, MARCUS DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-29-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-09-1995

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEITCH, MARCUS
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT DEITCH, MARCUS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV DOES 101-120
SUMMONS ISSUED TO CROSS COMPLAINANT DEITCH, MARCUS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT DEITCH, MARCUS SERVED JAN-31-1995, MAIL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEITCH, MARCUS
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-29-1995, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON JUN-27-1995 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(C) APPEARANCE ON MAR. 29, 1995 WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR CARDINER, SCOTT A AS ATTORNEY FOR CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV
SELECT PANEL OF ARBITRATORS, REJECTION DATE MAY-26-1995
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHERDAK, ROSTISLAV
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED BIERCE, LYN CLAYTON (042709), ARB-5 MAILED
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON SEP-11-1995
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT DEITCH, MARCUS ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
